candidates.why: Exact total current assets line on the balance sheet; directly matches ACT.
Current asset component only, not the total; inferior to the total line.
Balancing/plug line, not a reported total.

variables.notes: Selected the reported total current assets line.

candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet cash and cash equivalents line; directly matches CHE.
Restricted cash is not the standard CHE definition.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalent at the end of the period
candidates.why: Cash flow statement ending cash is supportive but balance-sheet cash line is preferred for CHE.

variables.notes: Preferred the balance sheet cash line over cash flow ending cash.

candidates.why: Exact total current liabilities line on the balance sheet; directly matches LCT.
Only one component of current liabilities, not the total.
Balancing/plug line, not a reported total.

variables.notes: Selected the reported total current liabilities line.

candidates.why: Explicit current maturities of long-term debt; matches short-term/current portion of debt and excludes leases.
Could represent current debt, but preview values are blank and the more explicit current maturities line exists.

variables.notes: Chose the explicit within-1-year debt maturity line. Excluded lease-related rows per instructions and avoided adding broader/possibly overlapping debt lines.

candidates.why: Likely current tax liabilities/taxes payable because it appears within the current liabilities section before total current liabilities.

variables.notes: No shortlist candidate existed. Chose 'Tax Liabilities' from the balance sheet current-liabilities section as the best match for taxes payable.

candidates.why: Explicit PP&E total line; best direct match among available labels, though it is gross rather than net.
May be net PPE/equipment, but appears narrower than total PP&E.

candidates.row_label: Property, Plant & Equipment - Accumulated Depreciation & Impairment

variables.notes: R:c. Used the explicit PP&E total line available. It is gross rather than net, but preferable to the narrower 'Equipment' row.

candidates.why: Exact total assets line on the balance sheet; directly matches AT.

variables.notes: Selected the reported total assets line.

candidates.row_label: Cash flow from operating activities Investing activities
candidates.why: Despite the concatenated wording, the values reconcile as net cash from operating activities before the investing section starts; best match for OANCF.

candidates.row_label: Cash flow from operating activities before changes in working capital
candidates.why: Intermediate subtotal before working-capital changes, not net operating cash flow.

final_choice.row_label: Cash flow from operating activities Investing activities

variables.notes: Chose the net operating cash flow line even though the label appears concatenated with the next section header.
